mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course ( COURSE_NO, COURSE_NM, COURSE_INFO, COURSE_PATH_NM, COURSE_DSTNC, COURSE_REQ_TM ) VALUES ( SEQ_COURSE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{courseNm}, #{courseInfo}, #{coursePathNm}, #{courseDstnc}, #{courseReqTm} )
mapper.select: SELECT COURSE_NO, COURSE_NM, COURSE_INFO, COURSE_PATH_NM, COURSE_DSTNC, COURSE_REQ_TM FROM course WHERE COURSE_NO = #{courseNo}
